source_id.description: The unique identifier of the source. 0 for no source

event_type.description: The type of the event. Information-seed discovery emits information_seed.discovery_started, information_seed.candidate_found, information_seed.candidate_rejected, information_seed.source_created, information_seed.discovery_completed, and information_seed.discovery_failed.

event_severity.description: The severity of the event. Generally 'high', 'medium', 'low' but a user can also use custom values

event_timestamp.description: The user's timestamp of the event. The time on the system who has generated the event

details.description: The details of the event. Custom JSON for the user to send to the plugins and/or Agents designed to handle the event. Information-seed discovery events include information_seed_id, information_seed, source_id, provider_counts, candidates_found, candidates_accepted, candidates_rejected, candidate_rejection_counts, sources_created, sources_linked, and error_summaries.
